untranslatable_reason: Signal requires direct access to VX front contract price, VIX spot price, and trading days-to-settlement calculation. Available indicators india_vix (VIX proxy) and hvol_20 (historical volatility) do not directly measure VX term structure contango or allow dynamic threshold calculation (0.1 × days_to_settlement). The precise contango condition cannot be expressed with allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: india_vix < hvol_20 approximates contango detection (VIX spot below forward volatility), but this is a weak approximation. True signal requires: (1) VX front price data, (2) VIX spot price, (3) days-to-settlement variable, and (4) dynamic threshold calculation. The ES short leg is not captured in indicator rules. Signal should be marked for manual implementation or custom indicator development.
